---
title: "persona4"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(terra)
library(sf)
library(here)
source(here::here("R","persona4.R"))
source(here("R", "validate_bbox.R"))
```


```{r}
# See everything
browse_places()

```
```{r}
# Replace "Plumas" with any part of your county or state name
browse_places("santa")
```

```{r}
my_data <- get_wri_for_place("Santa Barbara County, CA")
```
```{r}
terra::plot(my_data)
```

```{r}
is_valid_bbox(c(-119.869862,34.419399,-119.845808,34.408950))
```
```{r}
is_valid_bbox(c(-124.41060660766607,32.5342307609976,-114.13445790587905,42.00965914828148))
```

```{r}
validate_bbox(c(-119.869862,34.419399,-119.845808,34.408950))
```

```{r}
dplyr::is_grouped_df() 
```
